channel.title: Azure.microsoft.com/En-Us/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Azure.microsoft.com/En-Us/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Many agents, one team: Scaling modernization on Azure
item.description: We’re announcing the first agentic end-to-end modernization solution that brings IT and developers into a single, connected workflow. The post Many agents, one team: Scaling modernization on Azure appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog. Link to article: https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/blog/many-agents-one-team-scaling-modernization-on-azure/

item.title: Introducing Fireworks AI on Microsoft Foundry: Bringing high performance, low latency open model inference to Azure
item.description: With Fireworks AI, we're extending the Microsoft Foundry platform with high performance inference for state-of-the-art open models on Azure. The post Introducing Fireworks AI on Microsoft Foundry: Bringing high performance, low latency open model inference to Azure appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog. Link to article: https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/blog/introducing-fireworks-ai-on-microsoft-foundry-bringing-high-performance-low-latency-open-model-inference-to-azure/
